title: cerastium illyricum subsp. brachiatum
intro: Cerastium illyricum subsp. brachiatum, also known as a subspecies of the snow-in-summer plant, is a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cerastium illyricum subsp. brachiatum include its potential in reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region.
